description_long: This is a rustic wooden tankard or mug, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by two wide black metal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood has a weathered, natural grain with visible knots and texture, giving it an aged, hand-crafted appearance. A large, ornate black metal handle is attached to one side, featuring a curled design that provides a secure grip. The base is flared and reinforced with a thick black metal ring, adding stability and durability. The interior appears hollow and unfinished, suitable for holding liquids. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative engravings on the exterior.
description: A rustic wooden tankard with black metal bands and a large curled metal handle, featuring a weathered wood texture and reinforced base.
description_view_0: The tankard is shown with its ornate curled metal handle prominently visible on the right side, highlighting the wood grain and metal banding.
description_view_1: The view centers the back of the tankard, displaying the full length of the handle and the symmetry of the metal bands.
description_view_2: The handle is again visible but from the opposite side, showing the attachment points and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: The tankard is viewed from the side opposite the handle, emphasizing the uninterrupted wood surface and the metal bands.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at top and bottom
